Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

+/****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_get_SiteCaptureProcessingStates ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_SiteCaptureProcessingStates
+  @PortfolioId      uniqueidentifier,
+  @ProjectId        int,
+  @LastSyncDateTime datetimeoffset
+AS
+  SELECT CaptureGuid as UploadGuid,
+         Status as CaptureStatus,
+         Cast((CASE WHEN CaptureFileLocation IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS BIT) as Uploaded,
+         LastModified 
+    FROM SiteCaptureUploadRequests
+   WHERE PortfolioId = @PortfolioId
+     AND ProjectId = @ProjectID
+     AND LastModified >= @LastSyncDateTime
+
+   UNION
+   
+  SELECT CaptureGuid as UploadGuid,
+         Status as CaptureStatus,
+         Cast((CASE WHEN CaptureFileLocation IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS BIT) as Uploaded,
+         LastModified 
+    FROM SiteCaptureUploadRequestsArchive 
+   WHERE PortfolioId = @PortfolioId
+     AND ProjectId = @ProjectID
+     AND LastModified >= @LastSyncDateTime;
+
+  -- Consider indexes on PortfolioId, ProjectId, LastModified for both tables if this query is slow
+  -- and it is expected to return a small number of records based on the LastSyncDateTime filter 
+GO
+
 /****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_get_SiteCaptureUploadRequest_by_MayaCaptureId ******/
 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_SiteCaptureUploadRequest_by_MayaCaptureId
   @MayaCaptureId           nvarchar(36)

+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+SELECT @environment = dbo.fn_util_get_env()
+
+UPDATE ExternalService 
+   SET ParametersJson = '{"Region":"' + UPPER(@environment) + '"}'
+WHERE Type = 201 -- GainSight - Tracking Key
+  AND (ParametersJson IS NULL OR ParametersJson = '');
+
+/******************************** END OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  Start ***************************/
+
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER OFF
+GO

+--UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 85, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+GO
+DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  End  ****************************/
+

# PR #10869: PS-69087 Phase 6: org provisioning FileShare test coverage
**Tipo:** test
**Branch:** `wip/adam/ps-69087-phase6-coverage` → `wip/adam/tfc-prep-non-tc-files`

## Descripción
## Summary

Closes Phase 6 FileShare coverage gaps from PS-69087.

| # | Method | Test class |
|---|--------|------------|
| 63 | `IgnitionSystem.GetFileShares` | `IgnitionSystemTests` |
| 10 | `IgnitionSystem.CopyCustomReportFiles` | `IgnitionSystemTests` (org-from-template) |
| 60 | `ProjectSystem.CopyPhysicalFiles` | `ProjectCopyFilesTests` |
| 48 | `StaticSystem.CreateStaticFileID` | `StaticFileIDTests` |

## Changes

- Extended `Records/Portfolios/IgnitionSystemTests.cs` with GetFileShares and custom-report copy assertions
- Added `Records/Projects/ProjectCopyFilesTests.cs` and `Records/StaticSystem/StaticFileIDTests.cs`
- Updated `coverage-progress.md` and `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist`

## Test plan

Focused filter: IgnitionSystemTests (GetFileShares + CopyCustomReportFiles), ProjectCopyFilesTests, StaticFileIDTests

## Feedback de reviewers
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

This PR targets PS-69087 Phase 6 by filling remaining FileShare-related test coverage gaps around org provisioning helpers, and updates the supporting tracking artifacts used to manage the epic’s coverage checklist.

**Changes:**

Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

## Descripción
## Summary

PS-69087 Phase 5 — fills the **None → Direct** test coverage gap for the four FileShare-touching methods called out in `docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/test-coverage.md` rows #40, #41, #46, #68:

- `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinatesFromRotatedMatrixToNormal` (#40)
- `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinatesFromNormalMatrixToRotated` (#41)
- `PDFTextHandler.ExtractPDFTextSegmentsToDB` (#46)
- `ProjectSightDMSService.SaveQuickLoadPDFWithAnnotsAndRotations` (#68)

The pre-existing `[Ignore]`'d `UnitTests/DrawingTests/DrawingPageRotationTest` exercised PDFTron primitives rather than the rotation handler itself and was unsuitable as-is, so three new narrow integration tests are added instead.

## What's added

- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/DrawingRevisionRotationHandlerTests.cs`** — Stages a 90°-rotated drawing PDF in `FMSDirectory` and calls the `internal` `DrawingRevisionRotationHandler.ConvertCoordinates*` methods directly (via the existing `[InternalsVisibleTo]` on `Drawings/PDFTronDocument.cs`). Asserts the rect changes via the page default matrix, via its inverse, and round-trips through both.
- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/Drawings/QuickLoadPDFTests.cs`** — Drives the public `ProjectSightDMSService.SaveQuickLoadPDFWithAnnotsAndRotations` path through `DMSSystem.UpdateDMSPdfFileAsync`. Quick-uploads a PDF into `WebFileUploadDirectory`, applies an XFDF rectangle add + a 90° page rotation, and asserts the modified PDF stays in `WebFileUploadDirectory` with a different size. Companion test verifies the missing-temp-file graceful early-return.
- **`Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/PDF/PDFTextHandlerTests.cs`** — Publishes a drawing, clears its `DrawingText` rows, then drives `PDFTextHandler.ExtractPDFTextSegmentsToDB` explicitly and asserts the searchable-text row is created (incl. the appended annotation text). Companion test verifies the missing-DMS-file early-return.
- **`docs/temp/tfs-prep-non-tc-files/coverage-progress.md`** — flips Phase 5 to `[x]` and adds a Phase 5 implementation-notes section mirroring the per-method ↔ test-class table style used by Phase 2 / Phase 3.

Phase 5 playlist entries already exist on the parent branch under the "PDF / annotation export" section of `PS-69087-fileshare-methods.playlist` (rows 40, 41, 46, 68); no playlist edit is required in this PR.

## Test plan

- [ ] Build `ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests` cleanly on a machine with the `TrimbleCloud.FileService` NuGet feed configured (this PR could not be built locally — `NU1101: Unable to find package TrimbleCloud.FileService`).

    - `DrawingRevisionRotationHandlerTests` — 3 tests

    - `PDFTextHandlerTests` — 2 tests
- [ ] Confirm focused tests pass green; no broad/end-to-end suites need to run for this phase.

# PR #10894: PS-69003 PotentialChangeValue will be updated when a SCO linked to a contract is deleted and the PCO items was already linked to the contract.
**Tipo:** unknown
**Branch:** `wip/abdul/PS-69003` → `feature/Improv`
**Labels:** CFD

## Descripción
PS-69003 PotentialChangeValue will be updated when a SCO linked to a contract is deleted and the PCO items was already linked to the contract.

## Feedback de reviewers
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

This PR updates SQL procedure logic for PS-69003 so contract `PotentialChangeValue` is restored when an SCO/PCO item link is deleted, keeping contract potential values aligned with direct PCO item linkage.

**Changes:**
- Adds `PotentialChangeValue` adjustment when deleting `SubContractCOPCOItemLinks`.
- Regenerates `delta_procs.sql` and updates the stored procedure hash.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `Core/SQL/base_procs.sql` | Adds the contract `PotentialChangeValue` update in the canonical stored procedure. |
| `Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql` | Mirrors the stored procedure change for database upgrades, with regenerated refresh-module ordering. |
| `Core/SQL/record_procs_hash.sql` | Updates the procedure hash after SQL regeneration. |
[COMMENTED por @copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]]: ## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/base_procs.sql:53814 por @Copilot]: This update changes `PotentialChangeValue`, but the contract history entry built below still records only `PotentialValue`. Other contract-value paths that update `PotentialChangeValue` include it in the history XML (for example, `s_enc_add_or_update_SubContractCOPCOItemLinks` and direct PCO item delete), so this path will leave the contract audit history missing the restored potential-change amount. Please capture the old `PotentialChangeValue` and add a corresponding `PotentialChangeValue` history row here as well.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql:3151 por @Copilot]: This mirrored procedure update also needs the history XML to include `PotentialChangeValue`; otherwise upgraded databases will update the value but the generated contract history will show only the `PotentialValue` change. Please regenerate/update this block after adding the `PotentialChangeValue` history entry in `base_procs.sql`.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/base_procs.sql:53814 por @Copilot]: This is the behavior fixed by PS-69003, but there is no regression coverage for deleting an SCO after its PCO item has been direct-linked to the contract and verifying `PotentialChangeValue` is restored. The existing add-link test asserts the inverse transition, so adding a delete-side assertion/test would prevent this accounting path from regressing again.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql:3042 por @Copilot]: Remove the inline "-- wrong order" note from the parameter list. It’s not actionable for callers and makes the generated script look like it contains known defects; if parameter ordering truly matters somewhere, the fix should be to reorder the parameters (and any corresponding call-site docs) rather than leaving a warning comment in the signature.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/base_procs.sql:53814 por @Copilot]: This procedure performs multiple writes across PotentialCOItems, History, and Contracts without an explicit transaction. In autocommit mode, a runtime failure after the first UPDATE/INSERT can leave partially-applied changes; `SET XACT_ABORT ON` only guarantees rollback of the *current* statement unless the statements are wrapped in a transaction. Consider wrapping the write section (after validation/early returns) in a single `BEGIN TRAN`/`COMMIT` so the unlink + history + contract adjustments are atomic.
[Comentario en Core/SQL/base_procs.sql:53814 por @Copilot]: The new Contract `PotentialChangeValue` adjustment on SCO link removal looks correct, but there doesn’t appear to be an integration test covering the specific scenario described in the PR (PCO item was already directly linked to a contract, then linked to an SCO for that contract, then the SCO is deleted). Consider adding a test alongside the existing SubcontractCO delete/link tests (e.g., `Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/SubContractCOs/BusinessRulesTests.cs`) that deletes the SCO and asserts the contract’s `PotentialChangeValue`/`PotentialValue` are restored as expected.

Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.
